zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath於大約1330年出生在蘇格蘭培爾時，他的父親James Stewart 1st Baron Pearston55歲，母親Isabel Graham51歲。他和Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1386年在他的家鄉享年57歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath于大约1330年出生在苏格兰培爾时，他的父亲James Stewart 1st Baron Pearston55岁，母亲Isabel Graham51岁。他和Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1386年在他的家乡享年57岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath was born about 1330, in Perthshire, Scotland, his father, James Stewart 1st Baron Pearston, was 55 and his mother, Isabel Graham, was 51. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle. He died in 1386, in his hometown, at the age of 57, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath est né environ 1330, à Perthshire, Écosse, son père, James Stewart 1st Baron Pearston, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Isabel Graham, avait 51 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle. Il est décédé en 1386, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath um 1330 in Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Stewart 1st Baron Pearston 55 und seine Mutter Isabel Graham 51. Er hatte mit Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1386 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath è nato il circa 1330 nel Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, James Stewart 1st Baron Pearston, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Graham, aveva 51 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle. Morì nel 1386, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeathが約1330年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父James Stewart 1st Baron Pearstonは55歳，母Isabel Grahamは51歳であった。彼はHeiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettleとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1386年に故郷で57歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath(이)가 대략 1330년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Stewart 1st Baron Pearston(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Graham(은)는 51세였다. 그는 Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1386년 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, James Stewart 1st Baron Pearston, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Graham, tinha 51 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle. Ele faleceu em 1386, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath родился около 1330 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени James Stewart 1st Baron Pearston было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Graham, 51. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle. Он умер в 1386 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath nació aproximadamente 1330, en Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, James Stewart 1st Baron Pearston, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Isabel Graham, tenía 51 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Heiress of Holkettle Margaret Bethune - heiress of holkettle. Murió en 1386, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
